title: OreControl PRO
description: Advanced Minecraft plugin that replaces ore generation with a fully customizable drop system, including veins, GUI, and multi-language support.
body:
# ⛏️ OreControl PRO — Ultimate Mining System

Take full control of your server’s mining experience.


## 🚀 Overview  
OreControl PRO is a powerful and highly customizable plugin that completely replaces vanilla ore generation.

Instead of traditional ores, players receive dynamic drops based on:
- chance
- Y-level
- tool type
- enchantments

Perfect for survival, RPG, and economy-based servers.


## 💡 Why OreControl PRO?  
Vanilla mining is predictable.  
OreControl PRO makes it **dynamic, balanced, and fully configurable**, giving server owners complete control over progression.


## ⚙️ Features  
- ⛏️ Custom drop system (chance, height, tools)  
- 💎 Advanced vein mining system  
- 🎯 Fortune & Silk Touch support  
- 📦 Auto-pickup system  
- 🧠 Optimized performance (async logic)  
- 🖥️ GUI menus  
- 🌍 Multi-language (EN / RU)  
- 🔄 Live config reload  
- 🧩 Item & command drops  


## 🎮 Gameplay  
Break blocks → receive custom rewards  
Find veins → chain drops  
Control everything via GUI or config  


## ⚡ Commands  
- `/orecontrol help` — show all commands  
- `/orecontrol reload` — reload plugin  
- `/orecontrol debug` — debug mode  
- `/orecontrol menu` — open GUI  
- `/orecontrol links` — author links  


## 🔐 Permissions  
- `orecontrol.admin` — full access (default: op)


## 🧩 Compatibility  
- Minecraft **1.21+**  
- Paper / Spigot  


## ⚡ Performance  
Lightweight, optimized, and safe for large servers.


## 📈 Perfect for  
- Economy servers  
- RPG servers  
- Survival servers  
- Custom gamemodes
